title: ocotea harrisii
intro: Ocotea harrisii, also known as the New Caledonian sandalwood, is a species of evergreen tree native to New Caledonia, a region in the Pacific Ocean. The plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Ocotea harrisii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting immune function. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which are commonly used for their medicinal and therapeutic properties.
